query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS technical_resources (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  type ENUM('PDF', 'VIDEO', 'LINK') NOT NULL,
  fileUrl TEXT,
  category VARCHAR(100),
  productCategory ENUM('SPAS', 'SWIM_SPAS', 'MAINTENANCE', 'COVERS', 'ACCESSORIES', 'OTHER'),
  tags TEXT,
  viewCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  isPublic BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX type_idx (type),
  INDEX category_idx (category),
  INDEX productCategory_idx (productCategory),
  INDEX createdBy_idx (createdBy)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS technical_resources (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  type ENUM('PDF', 'VIDEO', 'LINK') NOT NULL,
  fileUrl TEXT,
  category VARCHAR(100),
  productCategory ENUM('SPAS', 'SWIM_SPAS', 'MAINTENANCE', 'COVERS', 'ACCESSORIES', 'OTHER'),
  tags TEXT,
  viewCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  isPublic BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX type_idx (type),
  INDEX category_idx (category),
  INDEX productCategory_idx (productCategory),
  INDEX createdBy_idx (createdBy)
)
